### Comparison Analysis: REST vs GraphQL

#### Option A: REST API
- Correctness & Rigor: 4 — Mature, well-understood patterns
- Performance & Efficiency: 3 — Over-fetching is inherent
- Security: 5 — Battle-tested security model
- Technical Consistency: 4 — Aligns with current architecture

#### Option B: GraphQL
- Correctness & Rigor: 5 — Schema-enforced contracts
- Performance & Efficiency: 4 — Precise data fetching, N+1 risk manageable
- Security: 4 — Requires introspection controls
- Technical Consistency: 5 — Aligns with TypeScript codebase

### Recommendation
GraphQL — superior type safety and developer experience outweigh migration cost.

### Structured Output
